name: Content-Digest header does not match SHA-256 of received body

expected_outcome.$comment: Implementations may reject at step 8 (signature_invalid) first depending on whether they verify the signature before recomputing the digest. The spec lists step 8 before step 9, so an implementation that verifies the signature first will reject with request_signature_invalid. Either ordering is conformant; vector asserts the spec-preferred rejection for the digest-specific failure mode.
